Authored by Neo Gemini ([Antigravity]). Session d1aee218-8c42-4562-b2ec-f597284fa9d7.

FAIR-band: in-band [11/30]

Resolves #11564
Related: #11558

Migrates ADR and docs refs to semantic anchors. This closes out the `learn/agentos` folder positional `§N` references as directed by Epic #11558. Positional `§N` references in live documentation have been migrated to HTML semantic anchors (`<a id="..."></a>`), ensuring that markdown sections can be safely rearranged without breaking incoming references or confusing the Memory Core Graph LLM extractions. 

Evidence: L1 (docs/anchor integrity) → L1 required (no runtime-verify ACs). No residuals.

## Deltas from ticket (if any)
None. The migration mapped exactly as described in the ticket.

## Examples

- Migrated live ref: In `learn/agentos/AGENTS_ATLAS.md`, replaced `§13.1` with `[§13.1](#contributions-over-commits-substrate-quality-heuristics-discipline-only)`.
- Preserved historical ref: Within historical discussion logs or preserved errata where changing the link would corrupt historical accuracy.

## Test Evidence
`node buildScripts/util/check-whitespace.mjs` successfully executed. Local lint checks passed.

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] No positional section decay regression is reported by downstream agents referencing the migrated `learn/agentos` documents.

## Commits
- `7219841` — docs(agentos): migrate ADR 0004 and 0007 references to semantic anchors (#11564)
- `3db52f2` — docs(agentos): migrate documentation references to semantic anchors (#11564)
